Key Highlights · Team & Process

Building a stronger team

👥
Team changes
New frontend + backend developer onboarded. iOS engineer search underway — building a more competitive structure.
🤖
AI in workflows
AI integrated into internal processes — from planning to delivery. Team output and speed increasing.
⚙️
GitHub migration
All sub-teams migrated to GitHub. Unified codebase management and better collaboration across teams.
💬
Intercom launched
Structured in-app support replacing Basecamp. Shifting the coach experience from "buggy app" to premium service.
Key Highlights · Product

Shifting focus to quality

Chat redesign underway — our most complex module, led by a strong web team
iOS team being optimized — keeping the best players, adding engineers who bring more value
Program Builder design complete — Q shift from features to polish
Design on pause while we improve what's already shipped
R&P module almost ready — full Tread team will be able to migrate to the app
Tiered rollout process launched
Coan → trusted coaches → full audience  ·  Slower, but more controlled and premium
